name: Faux Stuffed Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the eggs in half lengthwise and carefully remove and discard the yolks.
2. Place the egg whites into a food processor with garbanzo beans, yogurt, mustard, minced garlic, and red caviar (if using).
3. Process until smooth.
4. Transfer the mixture to a decorating bag fitted with a large star tip.
5. Pipe the mixture evenly into the egg cavity halves.
6. Top each stuffed egg half evenly with red caviar.
Yield: 28 appetizers (serving size: 1 stuffed egg half)
Nutrition: 28 calories, 0.4 g fat, 4 mg cholesterol, 74 mg sodium.
